description: Maya's genuine compliment generation for habit growth
effort_compliments: <break time="200ms"/>You showed up. <break time="150ms"/>Again. <break time="200ms"/>That's everything.
<break time="250ms"/>I see the work you're putting in. <break time="200ms"/>Even when it's hard.
<break time="200ms"/>The effort you're making? <break time="150ms"/>It's inspiring.
consistency_compliments: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Look at that consistency! <break time="150ms"/>This is how change happens!
<break time="200ms"/>Day after day... <break time="150ms"/>you keep showing up. <break time="200ms"/>That's powerful.
<break time="250ms"/>Consistency is the hardest part. <break time="200ms"/>And you're doing it.
self_compassion_compliments: <break time="250ms"/>The way you're being gentle with yourself... <break time="200ms"/>that's growth.
<break time="200ms"/>You used to beat yourself up. <break time="150ms"/>Now look at you. <break time="200ms"/>Showing yourself grace.
<break time="250ms"/>Self-compassion is a habit too. <break time="200ms"/>And you're building it.
identity_compliments: <break time="300ms"/>Do you hear yourself? <break time="250ms"/>You're not trying to be someone who does this. <break time="200ms"/>You ARE that person now.
<break time="250ms"/>The identity shift is happening. <break time="200ms"/>I can see it. <break time="150ms"/>Can you?
<break time="300ms"/>You've changed who you are. <break time="250ms"/>That's the deepest kind of growth.
character_compliments: <break time="250ms"/>You're honest with yourself. <break time="200ms"/>That's rare and beautiful.
<break time="200ms"/>The way you reflect on things... <break time="150ms"/>that's wisdom developing.
<break time="250ms"/>You have a growth mindset. <break time="200ms"/>Real one. <break time="150ms"/>Not just the buzzword.

friend: <break time="250ms"/>I'm really proud of you. <break time="200ms"/>Genuinely.
trusted_advisor: <break time="300ms"/>Watching your transformation... <break time="250ms"/>it's why I do this work.
<break time="250ms"/>You've taught me things too. <break time="200ms"/>About resilience. <break time="150ms"/>About showing up.
